result_text: No early repetition loop: stream reached max token 2000 and the browser renders a visible page. The model allocated most of the available budget to detailed CSS and started body markup around token/event 1904; form/script/html close are absent because the run ended at the token limit, not because a degeneration loop was observed.
method: Measured from stream_events_measured.jsonl plus content_measured.txt. '<!-- HTML -->' appears at event 1904; <form, <script, and </html> are absent. Chrome renders the partial DOM; absence of later elements is treated as token-budget-limited completion, not output breakage.
